subcodes.title: Words spoken en route in carriage in Haifa, 1915-04-18
subcodes.first_line: We are living and moving in a Cause the likeness of which is like unto this ocean. We must immerse ourselves in this sea and reach its depths, so that we may gather the unseen, brilliant pearls of the mysteries of the Kingdom of God
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
